description_long: This is a modern, wall-mounted microwave with a rectangular, boxy form and a clean, minimalist design. The front face features a smooth, light-colored door panel, likely made of glass or polished metal, with a small, dark horizontal strip at the bottom that may serve as a handle or accent. A compact, metallic control panel is positioned at the top center of the front face, with a single button or dial visible, suggesting a streamlined interface. The sides and top are plain and unadorned, with no visible vents or additional features, emphasizing the appliance's sleek aesthetic. The microwave appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, with a sturdy, solid build. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements, reinforcing its utilitarian, contemporary style.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted microwave with a minimalist rectangular design, featuring a smooth front panel and a compact control interface. The appliance is primarily light-colored with a dark accent strip and metallic details.
description_view_0: A side profile showing the microwave's thin, rectangular depth and the protruding front panel.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the smooth door panel, dark accent strip, and a small metallic control panel at the top center.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile, mirroring the thin depth and protruding front panel seen in view 0.
description_view_3: The rear view, showing a plain, unadorned surface with no visible features or openings.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is compact and located at the top center of the front face, featuring a single button or dial. There are no visible labels, displays, or additional controls, indicating a minimalist interface.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is integrated as a dark horizontal strip at the bottom of the front panel, flush with the surface and likely made of plastic or metal. It is subtle and does not protrude, maintaining the appliance's sleek appearance.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any surface of the microwave.
